title: Verify existing implementation of clamp utility
description: The clamp utility already exists and is fully tested at src/utils/clamp.ts with comprehensive test coverage in src/utils/clamp.test.ts. The task specified src/utils/math-helpers.ts but the implementation was placed in src/utils/clamp.ts instead. All tests pass covering: value within range, below min, above max, boundary conditions, negative numbers, floating point numbers, and error case for min > max.
existing_patterns: src/utils/clamp.ts - Single-function utility module with co-located .test.ts file following standard pattern
